audit_items.proof_trace: All three free sites in evict.c are safe: (1) L236 sdsfree(pool[0].key) is guarded by pool[0].key != pool[0].cached and the freed pointer is immediately overwritten by memmove then reassigned; (2) L514-516 sdsfree(pool[k].key) is guarded by key != cached and pool[k].key is set to NULL immediately after, preventing double-free; (3) L579 decrRefCount(keyobj) is the final use of keyobj, which is not referenced in any subsequent code. No pointer is used after being freed and no double-free path exists.
